_note: Upstream language-tools #3030 (#2992): a prop named `slot` on a component used INSIDE a Svelte 5 {#snippet} (here `<ButtonBadge slot="badge">`, where ButtonBadge declares `slot?: string`) must type-check clean — the snippet breaks the parent-component slot chain so `slot=` is a regular prop, not a legacy slot assignment to the enclosing <Button>. Mirrors upstream's component-slot-prop-in-snippet.v5 (expectedv2.json == []). Our overlay reaches the same clean result; the narrow wrong-typed-slot false-negative is tracked in notes/DEFERRED.md.
